mapper.sql: A.TODO_ID AS todoId , A.TODO_SJ AS todoNm , A.TODO_CN AS todoCn , A.TODO_BEGIN_TIME AS todoBeginTime , A.TODO_END_TIME AS todoEndTime , A.WRTER_ID AS wrterId , ( SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.WRTER_ID ) AS wrterNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_MEMO_TODO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.TODO_BEGIN_TIME DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMO_TODO A WHERE 1=1
